texto: One day, an unusually exciting event interrupted the rhythm of our regular middle-class teenage lives. A Russian woman, the mother of a girl in our class, was run over by a New York City bound train right in the center of town. Our classmate left school in the middle of the semester. The gossip was that the woman must have thrown herself under the train. The adults whispered about reasons, usual ones, but my friends and I were too busy planning what to wear to the prom to wonder about the savagery of adult passion.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Inna Swinton sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “One day, an unusually exciting event interrupted the rhythm of our regular middle-class teenage l…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amizade, affair, anna-karenina, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e termino.

frase_original: One day, an unusually exciting event interrupted the rhythm of our regular middle-class teenage lives. A Russian woman, the mother of a girl in our class, was run over by a New York City bound train right in the center of town. Our classmate left school in the middle of the semester. The gossip was that the woman must have thrown herself under the train. The adults whispered about reasons, usual ones, but my friends and I were too busy planning what to wear to the prom to wonder about the savagery of adult passion.

texto: What kind of woman tells all her secrets?” my mother continued, flabbergasted and disappointed in me. “Especially anything that has to do with your body making babies! I know a woman who had no ovaries when she got married. Her husband found out only years later that they couldn’t have children. The two of them are happy together still; they live in a big house, and have a cute dog.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Inna Swinton que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “What kind of woman tells all her secrets?” my mother continued, flabbergasted and disappointed in…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, fertility, flirting, com foco em flirting e mother-s-advice.
